title: narcissus bulbocodium var. hedraeanthus
intro: Narcissus bulbocodium var. hedraeanthus, also known as the striped narcissus or striped jonquil, is a perennial plant species within the Amaryllidaceae family that is native to the Mediterranean region. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, which can help to treat various health issues such as wounds, burns, and respiratory problems. The health benefits of Narcissus bulbocodium var. hedraeanthus include its potential to lower blood pressure, reduce fever, and act as an expectorant to relieve coughs and bronchitis. Traditional herbal preparations include using the plant's flowers and bulbs in teas, infusions, and tinctures to harness its medicinal properties.
